design_philosophy: Premium modern design with a warm traditional Telugu atmosphere. Cinematic visual storytelling, luxurious but approachable. Avoid tech-startup aesthetic. Emphasize large editorial typography, generous spacing, and smooth elegant transitions.

headings.usage: H1-H4, editorial large text, hero text

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous padding (p-12 to p-32) to let content breathe. Optical alignment over mathematical alignment.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: For 'Signature Dishes' and 'Experience' sections: Use asymmetric grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Mix col-span-4 and col-span-8 for tension and visual interest. Gaps should be wide (gap-6 to gap-12).
spacing_and_layout.gallery: Masonry or staggered columns layout (e.g., columns-2 md:columns-3 lg:columns-4 gap-4).

components.buttons: Rounded-full or minimal underline text links. Primary CTA: bg-[#5C1A1B] text-[#F9F6F0] hover:bg-[#4A1516]. Secondary CTA: border border-[#5C1A1B] text-[#5C1A1B] hover:bg-[#5C1A1B] hover:text-[#F9F6F0]. Must have magnetic hover effect (framer-motion).
components.cards: For testimonials: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/40 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,30,22,0.05)]). For dishes: Flat bento items, overflow-hidden with inner image.
components.navigation: Sticky or fixed header (z-50). Crystal glassmorphism backdrop-blur-md bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 border-b border-[#E5D8C8]/50. Links must be visible on desktop.

animations.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY. Standard browser scroll is forbidden.
animations.reveals: Scroll-triggered staggered Y-axis translates (framer-motion 'whileInView') and fade-ins for text/cards.
animations.hover: Image zoom inside containers (group-hover:scale-105 duration-700 ease-out).
animations.parallax: Soft parallax on hero and large background images (use framer-motion useScroll).

sections_requirements.name: Navigation
sections_requirements.details: Visible on desktop, glassmorphic backdrop. Include links to Story, Menu, Gallery, Contact, and a 'Reserve' button (WhatsApp link).

sections_requirements.name: Hero
sections_requirements.details: Full-screen (min-h-screen). Background image (hero_ambience) with gradient overlay (black/50 to black/20) for text legibility. Large serif headline: 'Authentic Telugu Flavors, Crafted with Tradition'. Two CTAs: 'View Menu' and 'Visit Restaurant'.

sections_requirements.name: Story of Vantillu
sections_requirements.details: Split layout (grid md:grid-cols-2). Editorial typography. Text explaining family recipes, heritage. Image of interior/architecture (story_image).

sections_requirements.name: Signature Dishes
sections_requirements.details: Bento grid (Tetris grid strategy). Col-span-8 for main dish (Thali), col-span-4 for others. High-end food photography with hover zoom.

sections_requirements.name: Experience
sections_requirements.details: Showcase of traditional architecture, interiors, family seating. Use 'experience_interiors' images in a staggered layout or small masonry.

sections_requirements.name: Digital Menu
sections_requirements.details: Elegant presentation. Mention QR. Show a mobile mockup or elegant list view. Link to a separate '/menu' page (Sample menu with Telugu dishes like Biryani, Gongura, Pesarattu).

sections_requirements.name: Testimonials
sections_requirements.details: Premium glassmorphism cards. Slider/Carousel (framer-motion or swiper). Praise for authenticity and ambience.

sections_requirements.name: Gallery
sections_requirements.details: Dynamic masonry of food and restaurant ambience. Hover transitions (grayscale to color, or scale).

sections_requirements.name: Location & Contact
sections_requirements.details: Google Maps embed. Opening hours. Clean, clear typography.

sections_requirements.name: Final CTA & Footer
sections_requirements.details: Massive typography (text-[8vw]). 'Ready to taste tradition?'. Encourage visit. WhatsApp redirect for reservations. Dark background footer (#2C1E16) with cream text.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic font 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' from Google Fonts.
Do not use generic blue/purple colors. Stick to the provided warm palette.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling in the main App wrapper.
Ensure all buttons and CTAs that indicate reservation or ordering have an href pointing to 'https://wa.me/...' to simulate WhatsApp redirect.
Create a separate route for the sample menu page (/menu).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use framer-motion for all scroll reveals, staggered bento cards, and magnetic buttons.
